heading: Requirements for debt relief agencies
label: 528 Requirements for debt relief agencies
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , and not applicable with respect to cases commenced under this title before such effective date, except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2005 Amendment note under .Apr. 20, 2005section 1501 of Pub. L. 109–8section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , and not applicable with respect to cases commenced under this title before such effective date, except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2005 Amendment note under .Apr. 20, 2005section 1501 of Pub. L. 109–8section 101 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the services such agency will provide to such assisted person; and

children.label: B
children.text: the fees or charges for such services, and the terms of payment;
provide the assisted person with a copy of the fully executed and completed contract;

clearly and conspicuously disclose in any advertisement of bankruptcy assistance services or of the benefits of bankruptcy directed to the general public (whether in general media, seminars or specific mailings, telephonic or electronic messages, or otherwise) that the services or benefits are with respect to bankruptcy relief under this title; and

clearly and conspicuously use the following statement in such advertisement: “We are a debt relief agency. We help people file for bankruptcy relief under the Bankruptcy Code.” or a substantially similar statement.

children.label: A
children.text: descriptions of bankruptcy assistance in connection with a chapter 13 plan whether or not chapter 13 is specifically mentioned in such advertisement; and

children.label: B
children.text: statements such as “federally supervised repayment plan” or “Federal debt restructuring help” or other similar statements that could lead a reasonable consumer to believe that debt counseling was being offered when in fact the services were directed to providing bankruptcy assistance with a chapter 13 plan or other form of bankruptcy relief under this title.

children.label: A
children.text: disclose clearly and conspicuously in such advertisement that the assistance may involve bankruptcy relief under this title; and

children.label: B
children.text: include the following statement: “We are a debt relief agency. We help people file for bankruptcy relief under the Bankruptcy Code.” or a substantially similar statement.
